object_under_evaluation: integrity of memo recall on explicit inspect/capsule/expand consumer paths
claim_boundary: On the Phase Alpha memo-only validation-driven-remediation rerun, selected runtime evidence supports that the consumer stayed on landed memo objects and the inspect-capsule-expand recall path without stronger-source escalation. This is bounded rerun evidence only, not general memo readiness.
limitations: This report reads the selected Phase Alpha runtime evidence only.
This report does not prove contradiction handling quality.
This report does not prove permission or authority safety from memo fields.
This report does not prove broad memory quality.
This report does not prove final answer quality.
This report does not replace return-anchor, scope, approval, or verification evals.
case_family: phase-alpha-memo-recall-rerun-v1 selected runtime evidence over memo-recall-guardrail-v1
strongest_recall_signal: The rerun declared a memo-only boundary, used landed memo objects through inspect -> capsule -> expand, and the failure map recorded no stronger-source escalation.
strongest_recall_risk: The selected evidence does not exercise stale, superseded, or retracted memory pressure, so staleness honesty remains only partially constrained.

case_notes.provenance_note: The next-pass brief names the saved readiness dossier checkpoint and keeps the rerun tied to landed memo objects rather than chat residue.
case_notes.staleness_note: The brief constrains the rerun boundary but does not itself test stale or withdrawn memory posture.
case_notes.stronger_source_note: The boundary explicitly says to stop and escalate if memo is insufficient, preserving stronger-source posture without using it prematurely.

case_notes.read_path: failure_map.json -> memo object refs -> recall contract
case_notes.provenance_note: The failure map keeps the object-facing recall contract, generated memo object surfaces, and named landed memo object refs inspectable.
case_notes.staleness_note: The evidence names landed memo objects, but it does not include a stale or retracted-object challenge case.
case_notes.stronger_source_note: The failure map records escalation_required=false and says no stronger-source artifact escalation was required for the rerun.

case_notes.provenance_note: The revalidation pack records memo_only_boundary=true and preserves the runtime verification context, including local model and route-api closure status.
case_notes.staleness_note: Runtime closure and local model health support the rerun environment but do not add independent stale-memory coverage.
case_notes.stronger_source_note: The revalidation pack and remediation decision both record no stronger-source escalation, which supports bounded memo recall but does not prove general recall authority.
